diagrams.title: Signal Lifecycle Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the complete lifecycle of a signal from generation to delivery
elements: Blocked signals go to pending set
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how signals are processed and understand blocked vs pending states

diagrams.title: Signal Handler Execution Context
diagrams.description: Shows how signal handlers execute relative to main program flow
elements: SA_MASK shows blocked signals during handler
diagrams.purpose: Understand asynchronous nature of signal handlers and blocking during execution

diagrams.title: Client-Server Signal Communication
diagrams.description: Depicts signal-based communication between parent server and child processes
diagrams.purpose: Visualize daemon/server process model and signal handling requirements
